evidence.description: As the successor of Grand Ayatollah al-Khoei and the continuation of the quietist Najaf scholarly tradition, Sistani is institutionally affiliated with the Al-Khoei Benevolent Foundation which carries forward al-Khoei's legacy.

editorial_notes: Sistani's institutional affiliation with the foundation is through his succession of al-Khoei's religious authority and the shared quietist scholarly tradition.
